infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NumSnap Daily needs access to your camera to take photos of numbers for the daily sweepstakes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NumSnap Daily needs access to your photo library to select photos of numbers for the daily sweepstakes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NumSnap Daily needs your location to verify entries and prevent fraud.

plugins.photosPermission: NumSnap Daily needs access to your photos to select images for the daily sweepstakes.
plugins.cameraPermission: NumSnap Daily needs access to your camera to take photos of numbers for the daily sweepstakes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: NumSnap Daily needs your location to verify entries and prevent fraud.
